AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
    ~&7712201763518885&~ {
        ~&8399878573055752961&~: "toogle-split-view"
        ~&7713561760591106&~: "Ctrl+S"
	~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
        ~&495331016591073787&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActive = !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.splitViewActive
}
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
